creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
When bge(4) is a member of a lagg(4) you will not see WOL listed in ifconfig bge0 output. You must /etc/rc.d/netif stop lagg0 before power off in /etc/rc.shutdown or /etc/rc.final.

And when bge(4) is a member of a lagg(4) you must enable it only through rc.conf and either boot or use service netif.

The reason for this is that lagg(4) has no knowledge of WOL. bge(4) will inherit lagg(4)'s view of the interface (without WOL).
